get_ai_analysis_of_your_mix: Get AI analysis of your mix
check_in_on_a_pledge_7_times: Check in on a pledge 7+ times
build_a_solution_mix_totaling_200_gt: Build a solution mix totaling 200+ Gt
how_do_you_get_to_school: How do you get to school?
zero_emissions_your_legs_are_the_green: Zero emissions! Your legs are the greenest engine.
shared_ride_about_0_3_kg_co_per_studen: Shared ride — about 0.3 kg CO₂ per student per trip.
a_car_emits_0_21_kg_co_km_solo_trips_a: A car emits ~0.21 kg CO₂/km. Solo trips add up fast.
splitting_rides_cuts_per_person_emissi: Splitting rides cuts per-person emissions by 50-75%.
fruits_veggies_grains_beans_lowest_foo: Fruits, veggies, grains, beans — lowest food footprint.
some_meat_some_veggies_average_diet: Some meat, some veggies. Average diet.
beef_produces_60_kg_co_per_kg_of_meat: Beef produces 60 kg CO₂ per kg of meat.
us_grid_0_4_kg_co_per_kwh: US grid: ~0.4 kg CO₂ per kWh.
coal_heavy_grids_up_to_1_kg_co_kwh: Coal-heavy grids: up to 1 kg CO₂/kWh.
recycling_saves_1_ton_co_per_ton_of_ma: Recycling saves ~1 ton CO₂ per ton of material.
landfills_produce_methane_28_more_pote: Landfills produce methane (28× more potent than CO₂).
typical_us_gas_car_0_21_kg_co_e_km: Typical US gas car: 0.21 kg CO₂e/km.
electric_rail_is_4_cleaner_than_a_car: Electric rail is 4× cleaner than a car.
aviation_has_2_3_warming_impact_beyond: Aviation has 2-3× warming impact beyond CO₂ alone.
one_long_haul_round_trip_3_tons_a_year: One long-haul round-trip = ~3 tons — a year of driving for many.
60_kg_co_e_per_kg_of_beef_highest_of_a: 60 kg CO₂e per kg of beef — highest of any food.
varies_farmed_salmon_higher_wild_cod_l: Varies: farmed salmon higher, wild cod lower.
about_1_10_the_impact_of_a_beef_meal: About 1/10 the impact of a beef meal.
beans_rice_veggies_lowest_possible_foo: Beans + rice + veggies = lowest possible footprint.
us_grid_average_lower_in_ca_higher_in_: US grid average; lower in CA, higher in WV.
netflix_2023_report_lower_than_older_e: Netflix 2023 report — lower than older estimates.
3g_co_e_per_text_prompt_long_context_1: ~3g CO₂e per text prompt. Long-context (1M token) queries cost ~3× more.
dall_e_midjourney_stable_diffusion_10_: DALL-E / Midjourney / Stable Diffusion: ~10–30g per image. 5–10× heavier than text.
sora_runway_kling_100_500g_per_clip_sc: Sora / Runway / Kling: ~100–500g per clip. Scales linearly with clip length + resolution. 50×+ heavier than text.
elevenlabs_murf_openai_tts_1_3g_per_sh: ElevenLabs / Murf / OpenAI TTS: ~1–3g per short clip.
copilot_cursor_claude_code_long_contex: Copilot / Cursor / Claude Code: long-context code prompts ~5g each.
keep_phones_3_years_to_halve_annual_im: Keep phones 3+ years to halve annual impact.
landfills_produce_methane_28_more_pote_2: Landfills produce methane (28× more potent than CO₂).
avoids_methane_and_builds_soil_carbon: Avoids methane AND builds soil carbon.
what_every_person_needs_to_reach_by_20: What every person needs to reach by 2030 to stay below 1.5°C.
cities_like_burlington_vt_already_run_: Cities like Burlington, VT already run on 100% renewable electricity!
a_diverse_portfolio_is_the_most_resili: A diverse portfolio is the most resilient approach.
denmark_gets_55_of_electricity_from_wi: Denmark gets 55% of electricity from wind already.
the_world_adds_renewables_faster_than_: The world adds renewables faster than ever.
stable_for_10_000_years_holocene_clima: Stable for 10,000 years. Holocene climate that all human civilization grew up in.
charles_david_keeling_begins_continuou: Charles David Keeling begins continuous CO₂ monitoring at Mauna Loa. His curve proved human-caused warming was real.
climate_scientist_james_hansen_tells_u: Climate scientist James Hansen tells US Congress warming has begun. 350 ppm is considered the "safe" ceiling by 350.org.
first_time_atmospheric_co_crossed_400_: First time atmospheric CO₂ crossed 400 ppm in 3+ million years. Earth's last 400 ppm era: tropical forests at the poles.
current_level_highest_in_at_least_800_: Current level. Highest in at least 800,000 years (from ice cores). Equivalent to ~1.2°C warming.
threshold_associated_with_2_c_warming_: Threshold associated with 2°C warming if sustained. Paris Agreement target: keep below 1.5°C.
mass_coral_bleaching_events_hit_the_gr: Mass coral bleaching events hit the Great Barrier Reef in 2016, 2017, 2020, 2022, and 2024. At 1.5°C warming, 70–90% of tropical coral reefs die. At 2°C, 99% die.
the_greenland_ice_sheet_holds_enough_w: The Greenland ice sheet holds enough water to raise sea levels 7 meters (23 ft). At ~1.5°C sustained, melt becomes irreversible over centuries to millennia.
the_atlantic_meridional_overturning_ci: The Atlantic Meridional Overturning Circulation moves heat from the tropics to Europe. It has weakened 15% since 1950. A full shutdown would cool northern Europe dramatically while disrupting monsoons in Africa and Asia.
the_amazon_generates_half_its_own_rain: The Amazon generates half its own rainfall. With 20–25% deforestation + rising temperatures, it risks flipping from rainforest to savanna. Some studies suggest the threshold is closer to 2°C with current deforestation rates.
arctic_permafrost_holds_twice_the_carb: Arctic permafrost holds twice the carbon currently in the atmosphere. Warming 3–4× faster than global average, it is already thawing and releasing CO₂ and methane (28× more potent than CO₂ over 100 years).
marine_based_ice_sheets_anchored_below: Marine-based ice sheets anchored below sea level. Warm ocean water is eroding them from beneath. Thwaites Glacier ("Doomsday Glacier") is the main risk. Collapse would raise sea levels 3.3 meters (11 ft).
northern_coniferous_forests_russia_can: Northern coniferous forests (Russia, Canada, Scandinavia) are stressed by warming, bark beetles, and wildfires. A full transition to grassland could release vast amounts of stored carbon.
the_gulf_of_maine_has_warmed_faster_th: The Gulf of Maine has warmed faster than 99% of the world’s oceans since 1980 — about 0.5°F per decade, roughly 3× the global ocean average. The cold-water Labrador current has weakened while warm Gulf Stream water reaches further north, fundamentally restructuring the food web in real time. Penobscot, Passamaquoddy, Maliseet, and Mi’kmaq coastal communities have documented these shifts in oral record decades before the satellites confirmed them.
cheapest_electricity_worldwide_in_2024: Cheapest electricity worldwide in 2024. Doubling capacity annually in several regions.
cheapest_electricity_in_history_grid_i: Cheapest electricity in history. Grid integration is the main challenge now.
distributed_resilient_typical_5kw_syst: Distributed + resilient. Typical 5kW system payback: 6–10 years.
1_3_of_food_is_wasted_preventing_waste: 1/3 of food is wasted. Preventing waste avoids methane from landfills AND the emissions to grow the food.
not_100_vegan_even_cutting_beef_3_a_we: Not 100% vegan — even cutting beef 3× a week has huge impact. Frees land for reforestation.
restore_125m_hectares_protects_biodive: Restore 125M hectares. Protects biodiversity + draws down CO₂ via photosynthesis.
plant_where_natural_conditions_support: Plant where natural conditions support growth. Co-benefits: cooling, watershed protection.
integrating_trees_into_grazing_land_li: Integrating trees into grazing land. Livestock get shade; soil stores 4× more carbon than bare pasture.
no_till_cover_crops_diverse_rotations_: No-till + cover crops + diverse rotations. Builds soil carbon while maintaining yields.
peatlands_store_3_more_carbon_than_for: Peatlands store 3× more carbon than forests globally. Drained peat = major emitter.
hfcs_are_1_000_9_000_more_potent_than_: HFCs are 1,000–9,000× more potent than CO₂. Kigali Amendment (2016) is phasing them out.
evs_produce_50_70_less_lifetime_emissi: EVs produce 50–70% less lifetime emissions than gas — improves as grid cleans up.
electric_trains_move_a_passenger_km_at: Electric trains move a passenger-km at 1/10 the emissions of a car.
dutch_cycling_cities_have_1_3_the_tran: Dutch cycling cities have 1/3 the transport emissions. Infrastructure creates the behavior.
insulation_heat_pumps_led_lighting_us_: Insulation + heat pumps + LED lighting. US buildings use 40% of primary energy.
3_4_more_efficient_than_gas_furnaces_w: 3–4× more efficient than gas furnaces. Work to −15°C in modern cold-climate models.
consistently_top_ranked_educated_women: Consistently top-ranked. Educated women have fewer children AND higher-impact lives. Compounds across generations.
replaces_wood_charcoal_fires_benefits_: Replaces wood/charcoal fires. Benefits: climate + indoor air pollution (kills 4M/yr) + deforestation.
grows_60_faster_than_land_trees_seques: Grows 60× faster than land trees. Sequesters CO₂ + restores fisheries + fertilizer.
middle_of_the_road_current_pledges: Middle of the Road — Current Pledges
walk_bike_or_bus_to_school: Walk, bike, or bus to school
try_one_meatless_meal_per_week: Try one meatless meal per week
talk_to_your_family_about_energy_choic: Talk to your family about energy choices
plant_a_tree_or_start_a_school_garden: Plant a tree or start a school garden
write_a_letter_to_your_representative: Write a letter to your representative
start_a_recycling_program_at_school: Start a recycling program at school
climate_explorer_keyboard_shortcuts_1_: Climate Explorer. Keyboard shortcuts: 1 through 6 switch tabs, Q toggles quiz.
export_your_climate_report_to_clipboar: Export your climate report to clipboard
hero_ppm: CO₂ today: ~424 ppm — the highest in over 3 million years
mission_panel_copy: Move from personal data to global evidence, justice, and solutions. Advanced policy and forcing labs stay available when you expand them.
average_us_household_emits_16_tons_co_: Average US household emits ~16 tons CO₂/yr. The biggest levers are home heating, transport, and diet — not plastic straws.
solar_wind_are_now_cheaper_than_new_fo: Solar + wind are now cheaper than new fossil plants in most markets. The hard part is grid integration, not generation cost.
continuous_co_measurement_at_mauna_loa: Continuous CO₂ measurement at Mauna Loa since 1958 — the longest-running atmospheric record. Sawtooth pattern from N. Hemisphere photosynthesis.
thresholds_where_the_system_shifts_sta: Thresholds where the system shifts state and stays there — Greenland melt, Amazon dieback, AMOC slowdown. Recent work suggests several may be closer than thought.
the_countries_that_emitted_the_least_f: The countries that emitted the least face the worst impacts. Climate is an equity issue first — vulnerability tracks income, geography, and historical responsibility.
drawdown_ranks_100_solutions_by_gigato: Drawdown ranks 100 solutions by gigatons of CO₂ avoided. Refrigerants, food waste, and educating girls top the list — not what most people guess.
interactive_climate_explorer_carbon_fo: Interactive climate explorer carbon footprint donut chart visualization
interactive_climate_explorer_emissions: Interactive climate explorer emissions timeline visualization
locked_in_at_1_5_c_sustained_warming_m: Locked in at ~1.5°C sustained warming. Most coastal adaptation still possible with seawalls, managed retreat.
associated_with_2_5_c_warming_displace: Associated with ~2.5°C warming. Displaces more people than any war in history. Hurricane surge becomes catastrophic for inland areas.
likely_by_2300_at_3_c_entire_nations_l: Likely by 2300 at 3°C. Entire nations lose viable territory. New Orleans, Venice, much of Vietnam.
multi_century_commitment_at_4_c_warmin: Multi-century commitment at 4°C warming. Requires Greenland + West Antarctic collapse. Human civilization's coastal geography permanently rewritten.
locked_in_with_greenland_most_of_west_: Locked-in with Greenland + most of West Antarctic gone. A hotter Pliocene-era coastline. Several centuries to millennia to fully realize.
cop28_note_25_of_all_historical_co: COP28 — note: ~25% of all historical CO₂
record_year_pakistan_floods_alone_disp: Record year — Pakistan floods alone displaced ~8.2M
welcome_the_people_the_climate_is_alre: Welcome the people the climate is already moving
pressure_the_loss_damage_fund_pledge_u: Pressure the Loss & Damage Fund pledge upward
read_the_people_you_just_heard_from: Read the people you just heard from
show_up_where_the_decisions_actually_g: Show up where the decisions actually get made
un_framework_convention_on_climate_cha: UN Framework Convention on Climate Change
aosis_proposes_loss_damage_at_cop1_ber: AOSIS proposes Loss & Damage at COP1 Berlin
un_hrc_teitiota_v_new_zealand_ruling: UN HRC Teitiota v. New Zealand ruling
world_bank_groundswell_part_ii_report: World Bank Groundswell Part II report
cop27_sharm_el_sheikh_l_d_fund_created: COP27 Sharm el-Sheikh — L&D Fund created
no_major_political_or_climate_event_ro: No major political or climate event. Routine policy work continued.
you_hit_deep_decarbonization_across_se: You hit deep decarbonization across sectors, built resilience, and held equity at the center. This is what a successful climate transition looks like when the social contract holds.
significant_decarbonization_across_the: Significant decarbonization across the energy and transport sectors, but adaptation and justice lagged. The carbon curves are right; the political coalition is fragile.
some_sectors_moved_others_stalled_publ: Some sectors moved. Others stalled. Public support eroded over time. This is the trajectory most real-world climate policies have run.
decarbonization_stalled_adaptation_gap: Decarbonization stalled. Adaptation gaps widened. Public support collapsed. This is the trajectory we work to avoid: climate impacts compounding without the social or technical infrastructure to respond.
initial_conditions_are_workable_spread: Initial conditions are workable. Spread investment across 2-3 sectors in the first period to find which feedback rules fire first. Public education + citizen assemblies pays off slowly but durably.
positive_feedback_dominates_earth_warm: Positive feedback dominates; Earth warms toward a hotter equilibrium. (A true "runaway" greenhouse — oceans boiling away — is a Venus scenario, not Earth at these forcings.)
high_albedo_negative_feedback_ice_age_: High albedo + negative feedback. Ice-age trajectory.
forcings_partially_offset_climate_slow: Forcings partially offset. Climate slowly drifts.
energy_balance_diagram_shortwave_sunli: Energy-balance diagram: shortwave sunlight passes through the greenhouse-gas layer and warms the surface; the surface radiates infrared, some of which the gas layer absorbs and re-emits back downward, trapping heat.
hypothesis_when_does_albedo_overcome_g: Hypothesis: When does albedo overcome GHG forcing?
explain_how_albedo_cloud_feedback_and_: Explain how albedo, cloud feedback, and GHGs jointly drive climate state.
